MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Elizabeth A. MacDonald, Esq., 922-5939, specially appearing for Plaintiff and Opposing Party
Dave Marcolini, Esq., 568-0742, specially appearing for Defendant and Moving Party
RULING:
DEFENDANT MICHAEL CONDE'S Motion For Order Setting Aside And Vacating Judgment And Granting Leave To Defend was heard and was DENIED for failure to sustain the burden. There is no sworn declaration as required by C.C.P. 473.5(b). Prevailing party is to prepare an order. (301/REQ/ck) JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR #1558
